basic_details.job_title: Andaman & Nicobar Command Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Steno, MTS and LDC Posts
basic_details.post_name: Stenographer Grade-II, Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training)
basic_details.short_information: The Andaman & Nicobar Command (ANC) has officially announced the Stenographer Grade-II, Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training) Recruitment 2026 with 10 openings. The detailed notification was published on 21st April 2026 at official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 56 years and hold 10th or 12th class pass qualifications can now submit their offline applications from 21st April 2026 to 30 days after the publication date. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 days after excluding the first date of publication in the Employment News

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 56 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years OBC: 03 Years PwBD: UR-10 years, OBC-13 (10+3) years, SC/ST-15 (10+05) years Ex-Serviceman: Period of Military service plus 03 years. Government Servants: Relaxable up to 40 years in accordance with instructions or orders issued by Central Government from time to time in this regard and further relaxable for 05 years, as in the case of Schedule Castes and Scheduled Tribes. UR-up to 40 years and SC/ST-45 (40+5) years of age.

qualification.details: Stenographer Grade-II: 12th Class or equivalent from a recognized Board or University. Skill Test Norms: Dictation: 10 minutes @80 words per minute, Transcription: 50 minutes (English), 65 minutes (Hindi) (On Computer). Persons working in similar, equivalent or higher grades in the Civil posts of the Defence Services including Armed Forces Headquarters Secretarial Service. Lower Division Clerk: 12th Class pass from a recognized Board or University. Skill Test: A typing speed of 35 words per minute in English or 30 words per minute in Hindi on computer (Time allowed-10 minutes). Persons working in similar, equivalent or higher grades in the Civil posts of the Defence Services including Armed Forces Clerical Services. Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training): Matriculation pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/ Institute. Persons working in similar, equivalent or higher grades in the Civil posts of the Defence Services including Integrated Headquarters of Ministry of Defence (Army, Navy & Air), Integrated Defence Headquarter and Inter Service Organisation under the Ministry of Defence.

salary_details.details: Stenographer Grade-II: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Lower Division Clerk: Level-2 (Rs.19900 - 63200) Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training): Level-1 (Rs.18000 - 56900)

selection_process: Screening of Applications Written Examination Skill Test (for LDC) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman & Nicobar Command Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.andamannicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Andaman & Nicobar Command Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Andaman & Nicobar Command Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for Stenographer Gr-II, Lower Division Clerk, and Multi-Tasking Staff posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training) post is Matriculation pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/ Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Stenographer Gr-II post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Stenographer Gr-II post is not exceeding 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Lower Division Clerk post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Lower Division Clerk post is as per Pay Matrix Level-2 (Rs.19900 - 63200).

faq.question: Q7. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to “THE OFFICER-IN-CHARGE, CIVILIAN RECRUITMENT CELL, NAVAL SHIP REPAIR YARD, PO-HADDO, SRI VIJAYA PURAM - 744102, SOUTH ANDAMAN, ANDAMAN & NICOBAR ISLANDS”.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Screening of Applications, Written Examination, Skill Test (for LDC), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Andaman & Nicobar Command recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is absorption.
